# Taxes

```{r}
#| label: setup-r
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

```{python}
#| label: setup-py
#| include: false
```

<br>


You don't need to be a tax expert; you need to know enough to avoid
obvious mistakes and capture obvious wins.

  - Marginal vs. effective tax rates
  - Pre-tax vs. Roth contributions
  - Tax-loss harvesting in taxable accounts
  - Common deductions and credits
  - When to hire a CPA
